channel.title: Blogs on guhan.me
channel.description: Recent content in Blogs on guhan.me

item.title: Under the Hood of React CRA
item.description: React Engine - Intro If you are aware of Webpack & Babel, I suggest you skip to the code part to set your own minimal React Server React CRA (Create-React-App), is a great package for devs getting started on React. It has the all the parts - loaders, configs, builds, templates, plugins - It is bootstrapped package for you, to get started working on your React App. It is recommended for everyone, who wants to learn React quick and people looking to learn their first JS framework.

item.title: [Guide] NextCloud on Ubuntu 18.04
item.description: 0. NextCloud, what’s that? If you are not interested to read the intro - Skip to the Guide NextCloud, is a fork of OwnCloud - being a suite of client-server software for creating and using file hosting services. Similar to Google Drive or DropBox where one can store Documents, photos and can share it with family and friends. Nextcloud is free and open-source which allows the client to be in control of their data and files, and getting rid of third-party sites that offer the similar services.
